# Synthetic Kp fixture — simplified 3-column format: YYYY-MM-DD kp1 kp2 kp3
# Daily-max = max(kp1, kp2, kp3). Simplified stand-in — the real GFZ archive splits the date into YYYY MM DD columns (see README "File format" / M1 note).
# This is PUBLIC geomagnetic data format — NO PHI, NO location.
2026-05-01 2.0 3.0 1.0
2026-05-02 5.0 4.0 6.0
2026-05-03 1.0 1.3 0.7
2026-05-04 2.3 3.7 2.0
2026-05-05 6.3 7.0 5.3
2026-05-06 2.0 1.7 1.3
2026-05-07 0.7 1.0 0.3
2026-05-08 3.0 2.7 3.3
2026-05-09 1.3 2.0 1.7
2026-05-10 4.0 5.0 3.7
2026-05-11 2.3 1.7 2.0
2026-05-12 0.3 0.7 1.0
2026-05-13 5.3 6.0 4.7
2026-05-14 3.7 3.3 4.0
2026-05-15 1.0 1.3 1.7
2026-05-16 2.7 2.3 3.0
2026-05-17 1.7 1.0 2.0
2026-05-18 4.3 5.0 3.7
2026-05-19 2.0 2.3 1.7
2026-05-20 0.7 1.0 0.3
2026-05-21 3.3 2.7 3.0
2026-05-22 5.7 6.3 5.0
2026-05-23 1.3 1.7 2.0
2026-05-24 2.0 1.3 2.7
2026-05-25 3.7 4.0 3.3
2026-05-26 1.0 0.7 1.3
2026-05-27 4.7 5.3 4.3
2026-05-28 2.3 2.0 2.7
2026-05-29 1.7 2.3 1.0
2026-05-30 3.0 3.3 2.7
